oz..d: n a unit of weight equal to one sixteenth of a pound or 16 drams or 28.349 grams

oza.t: abbr. Ozark Air Lines;  Inc. <美国>奥扎克航空公司; Ozark Airlines 密苏里州定期航线; Ozona

ozaena.d: n a chronic disease of the nose characterized by a foul-smelling nasal discharge and atrophy of nasal structures

ozalid.t: “奥萨里德”晒图机 (直接从原图或印刷品进行正面晒图的机器商标名)

ozark.t: [pl. ]密苏里州西南、阿肯色（Arkansas）州西北和俄克拉何马（Oklahoma）州东北部的高地；[美]密苏里（Missouri） 州奥扎克族印第安人（以 弓术出名）；密苏里州的别名

ozark mountains.t: 欧扎克山脉（美国中南部高原）

ozark plateau.t: [网络] 扎克高原；沙克高原；亦称奥沙克高原

ozarker.t: 欧扎克(美国亚拉巴马州东南部城市)

ozarkian.t: a. (美国中南部)欧扎克高原的,欧扎克人的

ozarks.t: 欧扎克(美国亚拉巴马州东南部城市)
ozarks.d: n. an area of low mountains in northwestern Arkansas and southeastern Missouri and northeastern Oklahoma

ozawa.t: [网络] 小泽征尔；小泽辉智；小沢

ozeki.t: n. 大关（相扑的三名最高级别之二）

ozena.d: n a chronic disease of the nose characterized by a foul-smelling nasal discharge and atrophy of nasal structures

ozocerite.d: n a waxy mineral that is a mixture of hydrocarbons and occurs in association with petroleum; some varieties are used in making ceresin and candles

ozokerite.d: n a waxy mineral that is a mixture of hydrocarbons and occurs in association with petroleum; some varieties are used in making ceresin and candles

ozonation.t: [化] 臭氧化; 臭氧化作用
ozonation.d:
n. The act of treating with ozone; also, the act of
   converting into, or producing, ozone; ozonization.

ozonator.t:
[化] 臭氧化发生器
[医] 臭氧发生器

ozone.t:
n. 新鲜的空气, 臭氧, 使人愉快的影响
[化] 臭氧
ozone.d: n. a colorless gas (O3) soluble in alkalis and cold water; a strong oxidizing agent; can be produced by electric discharge in oxygen or by the action of ultraviolet radiation on oxygen in the stratosphere (where it acts as a screen for ultraviolet radiation)

ozone sickness.t: （喷气机在4万英尺以上高空飞行时飞行员因吸入渗进机舱内的臭氧而引起的）臭氧病

ozone-ether.t: [医] 臭氧乙醚(乙醚、过氧化氢、醇合剂)

ozone-friendly.t: a. 不破坏臭氧层的, 不含破坏臭氧层的化学物质的

ozoner.t: n. 可驾车进入的剧场

ozonic.t: a. 臭氧的, 臭氧般的, 含臭氧的
ozonic.d: a. Pertaining to, resembling, or containing, ozone.

ozonide.d: n any of a class of unstable chemical compounds resulting from the addition of ozone to a double bond in an unsaturated compound

ozoniferous.t: a. 含臭氧的, 产生臭氧的

ozonize.t:
vi. 变成臭氧
vt. 以臭氧处理, 使含臭氧

ozonized.t: v. 以臭氧处理, 使含臭氧, 变成臭氧( ozonize的过去式和过去分词 )

ozonizer.t:
n. 臭氧发生器
[化] 臭氧化发生器
ozonizer.d:
n. An apparatus or agent for the production or application
   of ozone.

ozonizes.t: v. 以臭氧处理, 使含臭氧, 变成臭氧( ozonize的第三人称单数 )

ozonizing.t: v. 以臭氧处理, 使含臭氧, 变成臭氧( ozonize的现在分词 )
ozonizing.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Ozonize

ozonometer.t: n. (用以测定空气等中的臭氧含量的)臭氧计
ozonometer.d:
n. An instrument for ascertaining the amount of ozone in
   the atmosphere, or in any gaseous mixture.

ozonometry.d:
n. The measurement or determination of the quantity of
   ozone.

ozonophore.t: [医] 原浆粒(细胞的), 红细胞

ozonoscope.t:
[化] 臭氧检验器
[医] 臭氧检验器
ozonoscope.d:
n. An apparatus employed to indicate the presence, or the
   amount, of ozone.

ozonosphere.t:
n. 臭氧层
[化] 臭氧层
ozonosphere.d: n a layer in the stratosphere (at approximately 20 miles) that contains a concentration of ozone sufficient to block most ultraviolet radiation from the sun

ozonous.d:
a. Pertaining to or containing, ozone.
   P () the sixteenth letter of the English alphabet, is a nonvocal
   consonant whose form and value come from the Latin, into which language
   the letter was brought, through the ancient Greek, from the Phoenician,
   its probable origin being Egyptian. Etymologically P is most closely
   related to b, f, and v; as hobble, hopple; father, paternal; recipient,
   receive. See B, F, and M.

ozymandias.t:
奥兹曼迪亚斯（神话人物）
奥兹曼迪亚斯（诗名）

ozzard's filariasis.t: [医] 肠系膜与内脏脂肪内丝虫病

ozzie and harriet.t: [网络] 奥兹和哈里特；奥奇与哈里特；奥齐与哈丽雅特

ozzles.t: 流网与浮子网相连的短绳
